summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Light/Dark theme toggle functionality across Dashboard, Trade, and Wallet pages. All theme features working correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard theme toggle button (data-testid='dashboard-theme-toggle') visible and functional
Trade page theme toggle button (data-testid='theme-toggle') visible and functional
Wallet page theme toggle button (data-testid='wallet-theme-toggle') visible and functional
Light mode - proper white/light backgrounds (#FAFAFA) across all pages
Dark mode - proper dark backgrounds (#0B0E11) across all pages
Theme persistence across page navigation (localStorage key 'theme')
Candlestick chart background changes with theme (white in light, dark in dark)
Order Book component theme support working
Recent Trades component theme support working
All text readable in both themes (dark text on light bg, light text on dark bg)
Theme toggle icon changes correctly (Sun icon in dark mode, Moon icon in light mode)
Bottom navigation (Wallet page) theme support working
Cards and containers theme support working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle functionality fully tested and working. Theme state persists in localStorage with key 'theme' (values: 'dark' or 'light'). Default theme is dark. All three pages (Dashboard, Trade, Wallet) have theme toggle buttons with proper data-testid attributes. Candlestick chart (HTML5 Canvas) correctly respects theme changes.
